title: stachys peruviana
intro: Stachys peruviana, also known as hedgehog or prickly hedgehog, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa and Asia. It is a member of the mint family, with a distinctive appearance and fragrance, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Stachys peruviana is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is said to be a natural remedy for various ailments, and has also been used in traditional aromatherapy.
